situational_context: Running comeback day 67 (13 structured runs since May 3). HRV fully recovered to 37 ms weekly avg (BALANCED) after late-June dip to 33-34 (LOW/UNBALANCED post-Run #12). ACWR corrected to 1.10 from 1.35 peak — safely within comeback bounds. VO2max running improved to 41.5 (from 40.6 at last digest). Paris heatwave (34-37°C, Jul 6-14) forcing indoor/rest; last run was Run #14 on Jul 5 (6 km, well-tolerated). Traveling to Saint-Malo Jul 12-26 — coastal temps ~20°C will enable outdoor running resumption. Weight stable ~103.7 kg (single reading Jun 21, 18-day gap; pesée scheduled Jul 12). Vitamin D retest overdue (target July). E-bike commuting remains primary volume modality on sur site days (38 km round-trip, load 12-18/day).

plan_7d_ahead.type: Marche rapide / footing optionnel (avant train Saint-Malo)
Run #15 — 6-7 km Z2 bord de mer (Saint-Malo)

recommendations.text: Vitamin D retest is overdue (was due July 2026, 8 weeks post-comeback start). Schedule blood panel before leaving for Saint-Malo or find a lab there. Last level 27 ng/mL (Dec 2025) — insufficient; target ≥40 ng/mL.
recommendations.measurable: Lab order placed and drawn before Jul 20

recommendations.text: Protein intake consistently below target: 7d avg 111g vs 150g target. At 103.7 kg during running comeback, adequate protein is critical for tendon adaptation and lean mass preservation. Front-load protein at breakfast/lunch; add Greek yogurt, eggs, poultry.

Resume running at Saint-Malo (Run #15, Jul 13) after 8-day heat-forced pause. Anchor to demonstrated tolerance (6 km floor / 7.5 km ceiling). Start at 6 km Z2, extend toward 7 km if tissue feedback clean. Assess in first 2 km after the break.
recommendations.measurable: Run #15 completed at 6+ km, no pain lasting >24h post-run

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain (Achilles, patellar, tibia) lasting >24h after Run #15
markers_to_watch.reason: 8-day break + heatwave deconditioning; tissue tolerance may have regressed slightly at 103.7 kg

markers_to_watch.threshold: 18 days since last reading; pesée Jul 12 will break the gap
markers_to_watch.reason: Cannot assess body composition trajectory without data; single reading 103.67 kg on Jun 21

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 34 or 3+ consecutive LOW/UNBALANCED days
markers_to_watch.reason: Weekly avg recovered to 37 but individual scores range 33-39; monitor post-run response
